{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112445371B48F614FA99EF4F2CE"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7595428881196237630","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看好看，超级好看！我认为作者写的超好的。好看快更新(´｡✪ω✪｡｀)"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768453281,"group_id":"7512325091611397144","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwiMe9ch5QMBDkdfvaCTQgtlTQjl0R8cbPF7nWEWM+6h","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5cb96edbc0c84744a195936b065b2622~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624120&x-signature=cDqFlgyQoozg3oDboWVwjMyyOyg%3D","user_id":"3417737443421255","user_name":"爱吃店酒的商亮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3417737443421255","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512325091611397144","book_info":{"abstract":"综文野，咒回，主cb向。前期会有瓷的出现。
张寻春，普普通通的大学生预备役，在公交车到站后，一脚踏进一道白光里，被拐到了异世界。
到了异世界后她经历了：
开门见太宰治和织田作之助，接到瓷爹的电话，出门买东西遇见中原中也等一系列巧遇。
综合意识给的所谓“帮手”也每天给她添堵
“没品的人类”
“你有品，你最有品行了吧。你有品还不是要吃我这个没品的人类做的饭？有本事你硬气点说不吃。”
“对不起，是我刚刚说话声音太大了。”
张寻春在异世界开启了她鸡飞狗跳的拯救支柱人物，改变剧情走向的生活
ps：作者真的不会写简介，大家凑活着看吧。这本是作者看同人文上头后的产物。作者会尽量不ooc的，如果ooc算我的。
有写的不好的地方希望大家多多包涵，如果实在觉得作者写的啥也不是，请直接离开，不要骂我和寻春，求求了","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o026f3fe329313b4c3c74ccf6ada10b6e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"何处春信","author_id":"","book_id":"7512325091611397144","book_name":"综漫：这种事为什么是我来啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8e8d8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7515319522748793368","read_count":"197","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"188501"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"68","tags":"动漫衍生,综漫,无CP,同人","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o026f3fe329313b4c3c74ccf6ada10b6e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779252293&x-signature=J%2F1v%2F6wmeFzhogBfjiW97y3puOU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"97800315994","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"61"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112445371B48F614FA99EF4F2CE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":9172,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4
